# user-text

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Renders user text events in the JSONL viewer.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `JsonlViewer.EventRenderer` "user-text" → `UserTextRow`
  - Uses: `conversations/conversation-view/jsonl-viewer.JsonlViewer`, `conversations/conversation-view/jsonl-viewer.RowActions`, `conversations/conversation-view/jsonl-viewer.useStickyReport`, `primitives/inline-text.InlineText`, `primitives/select-scope.ContentScope`, `primitives/text.Text`
